AFP Portfolio Returns — ETF vs Mutual Fund attribution
scope: · monthly beginning-weight contributions, geometrically chained (Carino-linked) · excludes unpriced instruments
Total Return by AFP
selected year · international portfolio
Monthly Portfolio Returns
per AFP · month over month
Allocation vs Selection (Brinson-Fachler, benchmark = combined system)
Allocation = effect of over/underweighting ETFs vs MFs relative to the system · Selection = instrument choices within each vehicle bucket
Product Trailing Returns
Methodology & caveats. Monthly instrument returns from end-of-month NAVs (ETFs: yfinance adjusted close — dividends reinvested, USD; mutual funds: FT NAVs — share-class currency, distribution classes understate total return). Portfolio month return = Σ beginning-AUM-weight × return; bucket returns computed over priced AUM only ("Priced AUM" column shows coverage — unpriced instruments such as private funds and suspended Russia positions are excluded). Multi-month returns geometrically chained; ETF/MF contributions Carino-linked so they sum to the total. Brinson effects are scaled to the chained active return. Figures are gross of AFP-level fees, in instrument listing currency (no PEN conversion).
